edge_hypothesis: Strong trends (ADX>30) entered via Supertrend direction flip with wide asymmetric exits (3x ATR stop, 5x ATR TP) capture large trend legs. The only profitable outcome in 60+ cycles was an exit_change variant with wider stops (PF 1.033). Supertrend's built-in dynamic stop adapts to volatility, and a high ADX gate ensures we only enter established trends, trading less frequently but with higher expectancy per trade.
regime_assumption: TRENDING ONLY. ADX > 25-35 gate. Expected to perform well in trending regime (historical PF 1.054 on trending), break even or slightly negative in ranging. Invalidate if trending-regime PF < 0.95 across 200+ trades.
invalidation_conditions: Fewer than 50 trades across full backtest (signal too rare)

variants.name: supertrend_wide_asymmetric
variants.description: Supertrend flip with ADX>30 and wide asymmetric risk:reward (1:1.67). Tests whether high-quality trend entries with patient exits produce positive expectancy.
entry_long: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from negative to positive (direction change).
entry_short: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from positive to negative (direction change).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Stop loss at 3.0x ATR below entry (wide stop to avoid premature exit).
Take profit at 5.0x ATR above entry (asymmetric R:R of 1:1.67).
Exit on opposite Supertrend direction flip.
Exit on max 30 bars in trade.
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Whipsaw during low-ADX periods
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Trend exhaustion after extended move
risk_rules: Wide ATR stop (3.0x) absorbs normal trend volatility.
Asymmetric TP (5.0x) requires fewer winners to be profitable.

components.notes: SUPERTd_7_3.0 direction flip as primary entry signal

variants.name: supertrend_ultra_selective
variants.description: Ultra-high ADX gate (>35) with moderate exits. Tests whether extreme trend selectivity produces fewer but higher-quality trades.
entry_long: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from negative to positive.
entry_short: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from positive to negative.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Regime gate: ADX_14 > 35 (very strong trending only)
exit_rules: Stop loss at 2.0x ATR below entry.
Take profit at 4.0x ATR above entry (R:R 1:2).
Exit on opposite Supertrend direction flip.
Exit on max 25 bars in trade.
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Too few trades for statistical significance
Hypothesis failure mode guard: ADX_35 filters out all viable entries
risk_rules: If fewer than 30 trades in backtest, result is inconclusive.

components.notes: SUPERTd_7_3.0 direction flip as primary entry signal

variants.name: supertrend_moderate_1h
variants.description: Moderate ADX gate on 1h timeframe. Tests whether higher-frequency supertrend signals on ETH/1h capture intraday trends with acceptable trade count.
entry_long: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from negative to positive.
entry_short: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from positive to negative.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Stop loss at 2.5x ATR below entry.
Take profit at 4.0x ATR above entry (R:R 1:1.6).
Exit on opposite Supertrend direction flip.
Exit on max 20 bars in trade.
Hypothesis failure mode guard: 1h noise causing excessive whipsaws
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Fee drag on higher frequency
risk_rules: Reduced risk per trade for higher-frequency timeframe.

components.notes: SUPERTd_7_3.0 direction flip as primary entry signal
